_comment: CONFIGURATION REFERENCE ONLY — These defaults are NOT used as runtime fallbacks. The orchestrator requires all model config (baseUrl, model) to be provided from the frontend's ModelProfile system (persisted in localStorage). If a field is missing, the pipeline returns a clear error. These values exist only as documentation/examples for users setting up their profiles.

defaults._comment: EXAMPLE ONLY — Configure via UI, not here. Planner: general-purpose LLM for glossary/style analysis. Executor: translation-specialized model. Proofreader: general LLM for QA.
